mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.post_no, c.cmt_no, c.cmt_cn, c.reg_dttm, c.mdf_dttm, c.user_no, m.user_nm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.post_no ORDER BY c.reg_dttm DESC, c.cmt_no DESC) AS rn FROM apt_board_comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON m.user_no = c.user_no WHERE c.del_yn = 'N' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) ans ON ans.post_no = abp.post_no
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(abi.board_no) FROM apt_board_instance abi WHERE TRIM(abi.apt_cmplex_no) = TRIM(#{aptCmplexNo}) AND TRIM(abi.board_ty_cd) = TRIM(#{boardTyCd}) AND TRIM(abi.use_yn) = 'Y'
SELECT MAX(abi.board_no) FROM apt_board_instance abi WHERE TRIM(abi.board_ty_cd) = TRIM(#{boardTyCd}) AND TRIM(abi.use_yn) = 'Y'

SELECT hh.user_no userNo , hh.ho_no hoNo , au.apt_cmplex_no aptCmplexNo FROM hshld_head hh JOIN apt_detail ad ON hh.ho_no = ad.ho_no JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no WHERE hh.user_no = #{userNo} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT abp.post_no postNo , abp.board_no boardNo , abp.ttl ttl , abp.cn cn , abp.wrtr_id wrtrId , wm.user_nm wrtrNm , abp.prrt_cd prrtCd , abp.reg_dttm regDttm , abp.mdf_dttm mdfDttm , abp.inq_cnt inqCnt , abp.del_yn delYn , abp.atch_file_id atchFileId , abp.opn_yn opnYn , CASE WHEN ans.cmt_no IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ansYn , ans.cmt_no ansCmtNo , ans.cmt_cn ansCn , ans.reg_dttm ansRegDttm , ans.mdf_dttm ansMdfDttm , ans.user_no ansUserNo , ans.user_nm ansUserNm FROM apt_board_post abp LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.user_id = abp.wrtr_id
WHERE abp.post_no = #{postNo} AND abp.wrtr_id = #{userId} AND abp.del_yn = 'N'

SELECT abp.post_no postNo , abp.board_no boardNo , abp.ttl ttl , abp.cn cn , abp.wrtr_id wrtrId , wm.user_nm wrtrNm , abp.prrt_cd prrtCd , abp.reg_dttm regDttm , abp.mdf_dttm mdfDttm , abp.inq_cnt inqCnt , abp.del_yn delYn , abp.atch_file_id atchFileId , abp.opn_yn opnYn , CASE WHEN ans.cmt_no IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ansYn , ans.cmt_no ansCmtNo , ans.cmt_cn ansCn , ans.reg_dttm ansRegDttm , ans.mdf_dttm ansMdfDttm , ans.user_no ansUserNo , ans.user_nm ansUserNm FROM apt_board_post abp LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.user_id = abp.wrtr_id
WHERE abp.post_no = #{postNo} AND abp.del_yn = 'N'

SELECT c.cmt_no ansCmtNo , c.cmt_cn ansCn , c.reg_dttm ansRegDttm , c.mdf_dttm ansMdfDttm , c.user_no ansUserNo , m.user_nm ansUserNm , 'Y' ansYn FROM ( SELECT c.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.reg_dttm DESC, c.cmt_no DESC) rn FROM apt_board_comment c WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ) c LEFT JOIN member m ON m.user_no = c.user_no WHERE c.rn = 1
SELECT c.cmt_no FROM ( SELECT c.cmt_no, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.reg_dttm DESC, c.cmt_no DESC) rn FROM apt_board_comment c WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ) c WHERE c.rn = 1
